# CSPR.click Documentation

## CSPR.click (latest)

- [Introduction](https://docs.cspr.click/documentation/introduction.md)

- [React Context Provider](https://docs.cspr.click/cspr.click-sdk/integration/react-context-provider.md)

- [Network selector](https://docs.cspr.click/cspr.click-sdk/integration/customizing-the-top-bar/network-selector.md)
- [Identicons](https://docs.cspr.click/cspr.click-sdk/integration/identicons.md)
- [Legacy csprclick-ui Package](https://docs.cspr.click/cspr.click-sdk/integration/legacy-csprclick-ui.md)
- [Customizing the top bar](https://docs.cspr.click/cspr.click-sdk/integration/legacy-csprclick-ui/customizing-the-top-bar.md)
- [Account dropdown menu](https://docs.cspr.click/cspr.click-sdk/integration/legacy-csprclick-ui/customizing-the-top-bar/account-dropdown-menu.md)
- [Theme selector](https://docs.cspr.click/cspr.click-sdk/integration/legacy-csprclick-ui/customizing-the-top-bar/theme-selector.md)
- [Network selector](https://docs.cspr.click/cspr.click-sdk/integration/legacy-csprclick-ui/customizing-the-top-bar/network-selector.md)
- [Language selector](https://docs.cspr.click/cspr.click-sdk/integration/legacy-csprclick-ui/customizing-the-top-bar/language-selector.md)
- [Currency selector](https://docs.cspr.click/cspr.click-sdk/integration/legacy-csprclick-ui/customizing-the-top-bar/currency-selector.md)
- [Custom selector](https://docs.cspr.click/cspr.click-sdk/integration/legacy-csprclick-ui/customizing-the-top-bar/custom-selector.md)
- [Theme customization](https://docs.cspr.click/cspr.click-sdk/integration/legacy-csprclick-ui/customizing-the-top-bar/customizing-theme.md)
- [Create your own custom theme](https://docs.cspr.click/cspr.click-sdk/integration/legacy-csprclick-ui/customizing-the-top-bar/create-your-own-theme.md)
- [Add custom information badge](https://docs.cspr.click/cspr.click-sdk/integration/legacy-csprclick-ui/customizing-the-top-bar/adding-custom-badge.md)
- [Hooks and Components](https://docs.cspr.click/cspr.click-sdk/integration/legacy-csprclick-ui/hooks.md)
- [Reference](https://docs.cspr.click/cspr.click-sdk/reference.md)
- [Properties](https://docs.cspr.click/cspr.click-sdk/reference/properties.md)
- [Methods](https://docs.cspr.click/cspr.click-sdk/reference/methods.md)
- [Types](https://docs.cspr.click/cspr.click-sdk/reference/types.md)
- [Events](https://docs.cspr.click/cspr.click-sdk/reference/events.md)
- [CSPR.cloud proxies](https://docs.cspr.click/cspr.click-sdk/reference/cloud-proxies.md)
